title: Tutorials
content: еєЏиЁЂ# This section contains a series of technical tutorials.

title: Hugo Book Theme Review
content:
еєЏиЁЂ# Hugo Book is a clean, content-focused documentation theme.
Pros# Clean Design: No distracting elements. Markdown Friendly: Perfectly supports standard Markdown syntax. Multilingual Support: Built-in i18n support. Cons# Custom styles require overriding SCSS variables. Summary# It is very suitable for technical documentation and personal knowledge bases.

title: Hugo Quick Start
content:
еєЏиЁЂ# This tutorial will help you quickly start a Hugo site.
Install Hugo# Install using Homebrew (macOS) or apt (Linux).

title: Python Basics Tutorial
content:
еєЏиЁЂ# This tutorial will introduce the basics of the Python programming language.
Variables and Data Types# Python supports various data types, including integers, floats, strings, and booleans.
Control Flow# Learn how to use if-else statements and loop structures.

title: Python Advanced Tutorial
content:

Functions and Modules# Learn how to define functions and import and use modules.
Object-Oriented Programming# Master the concepts of classes, objects, inheritance, and polymorphism.

title: First Post
content:
еєЏиЁЂ# This is my first article after building my blog with Hugo + GitHub Pages.
Setup Process# Initialize Hugo project Install hugo-book theme Configure GitHub Pages deployment Publish the first post Tech Stack# Static Site Generator: Hugo Theme: hugo-book Deployment Platform: GitHub Pages I hope this blog can record my learning and growth journey!
